narrative:
Flatrock Township has 900 registered voters, with 47.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.0 percentage points.
